channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Senior devs flee when on-call sucks
item.description: leave for 20% more stock. They leave becaus with senior devs quit tech — told me: “We paid them €120k base, €40k bonus, and.

item.title: Why live demos lie about production
item.description: Cut API response time 78% by bounding LLM connection pools — the silent socket leak most vibe-coded services miss

item.title: AI pipelines: the cache you forgot to warm
item.description: ives a 50–70% hit-rate on day one, even bef with AI pipelines cache you — build a pipeline: fetch data, chunk it, embed it, s.

item.title: Senior devs quit for autonomy, not cash
item.description: Senior devs quit tech: 025. Only 12% named compensation as their t. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: Database pools: why 100 fails in 2026
item.description: he app. - 90% latency at P99 > 8 seconds. - with Set max pool size — this when I inherited a Spring Boot 3.

item.title: Crush remote tech interviews without LeetCode
item.description: Pass remote tech interviews without LeetCode drills — focus on reliability, cost, and communication with concrete examples, tools, and benchmarks for 2026.

item.title: MCP servers: silent infrastructure for AI scaling
item.description: Reduce LLM costs 40% and latency 79% with MCP servers — the open protocol turning ad-hoc API calls into a managed backend service that every developer should understand.

item.title: Zero-trust for small teams: skip the bloat
item.description: Cut $15k/year on zero-trust hype with a 4-hour session policy and hardware-backed MFA — real-world benchmarks and the threat budget model small teams actually need.

item.title: Data skills that move AI salaries in 2026
item.description: Python vs SQL that pays more in 2026 — benchmarked latency, TCO, and salary. Learn which AI skill actually moves your paycheck, with real code and data.

item.title: How AI coding empowers non-traditional devs
item.description: Cut deployment time 90% with Railway, Fly.io, and PocketBase — the AI-friendly stack that shipped real products in 2026 — no DevOps needed.

item.title: Design tenant databases that won't break at scale
item.description: Cut multi-tenant SaaS costs 40% and scale to millions without schema-per-tenant — real examples from Linear, GitLab, Shopify with PostgreSQL 16, pg_partman 5.0, Redis 7.2.

item.title: Compare WebSocket, SSE, polling costs
item.description: Pick the fastest, cheapest real-time pattern in minutes — median latency and cost figures for WebSocket vs SSE vs long polling in 2026

item.title: Freelance burnout: the systems failure
item.description: Cut burnout in 8 weeks: 3 concrete fixes that saved me $8k in lost productivity. Freelance burnout symptoms, contract clauses, and tooling audits that actually work in 2026.

item.title: Don’t queue this up unless you have to
item.description: Cut 60% of system failures with message queues — real latency, cost, and failure data from 2026 systems. When to queue, when to skip it, and what breaks first.

item.title: Freelance rates: the numbers that stuck in 2026
item.description: Freelance developer rates in 2026: actual numbers from 500+ contracts with platform fees, taxes, and scope volatility baked in — calculate your true hourly rate in 30 minutes.

item.title: Vector Search in Postgres vs Specialized DBs
item.description: Cut vector search latency 90% when moving from Postgres pgvector 0.7.0 to Qdrant 1.9.0 — real p99 measurements, cost data, and the exact moment teams should switch.

item.title: Remote salary hacks for lower-cost countries
item.description: Cut remote salary friction 40% with a negotiation packet: salary bands, FX hedge, tech-cost savings, SOC 2 checklist. Nairobi-based engineer shows how to raise rates without losing deals.

item.title: RAG in prod: 3 bottlenecks tutorials ignore
item.description: Cut RAG latency 83% and infra costs 27% by fixing three tutorial-blind bottlenecks: HNSW depth, missing cache, and sparse retrieval latency — with actual numbers and configs.

item.title: Instrument LLMs: Track what breaks before users do
item.description: Cut AI pipeline failures 90% with 5 key metrics — Redis caching, token limits, Prometheus, OpenTelemetry traces, and alert thresholds that actually catch issues before users do.

item.title: From $3k to $12k: how I re-rated my salary
